mapper.select: SELECT MAX(version) FROM sys_meta_publish WHERE table_code = #{tableCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_meta_publish ( publish_code, table_code, table_name, version, status, total_sqls, success_sqls, failed_sqls, error_message, snapshot_data, forced, publish_by, publish_by_name, publish_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{publishCode}, #{tableCode}, #{tableName}, #{version}, #{status}, #{totalSqls}, #{successSqls}, #{failedSqls}, #{errorMessage}, #{snapshotData}, #{forced}, #{publishBy}, #{publishByName}, #{publishTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_meta_publish SET status = #{status}, total_sqls = #{totalSqls}, success_sqls = #{successSqls}, failed_sqls = #{failedSqls}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, forced = #{forced}, publish_by_name = #{publishByName}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
